ABOUT ME

The intersection of AI,
intelligence, and impact.

Vibeena R
MTech Software Engineer · AI & ML Builder

I'm Vibeena R — an Integrated M.Tech Software Engineering student at VIT Vellore (2022–2027), with a CGPA of 7.38. I build intelligent, production-ready systems that solve real-world problems across cloud, healthcare, and data science.

My work spans ML pipelines, computer vision, full-stack AI apps, and MLOps — from cloud anomaly detection on AWS to 3D medical imaging reconstruction and NLP pipelines using BERT. I hold certifications in AWS Cloud, IBM Data Science (Gen AI), and Cisco Cybersecurity.

🎓 CGPA 7.38 / 10 🟢 Open to opportunities 🎓 VIT Vellore

PROJECTS

Selected Work

NLP · GenAI

TriSense — LLM + BERT NLP Pipeline

BERT · Transformers · TensorFlow · OpenAI API

Multi-sense language understanding pipeline using BERT and LLMs for semantic extraction, generation, and word-sense disambiguation. REST API deployment with in-memory caching to reduce redundant LLM inference requests.

📊 Benchmarked inference latency across multiple architectures; optimized transformer configs for classification.
PythonBERTTensorFlowFastAPIOpenAI
View on GitHub ↗
Full-Stack AI

Potato Leaf Disease — Full Stack AI App

CNN · FastAPI · TensorFlow Serving · GCP · React.js

Full-stack AI application serving a CNN-based disease classification model through FastAPI and TensorFlow Serving, containerized with Docker and deployed on GCP. React.js frontend with confidence-score responses and async API endpoints.

🌿 Scalable inference on GCP with real-time disease prediction and monitoring dashboard.
PythonCNNFastAPIDockerGCPReact.js
View on GitHub ↗
Healthcare · CV

PCOS AI Diagnostic System

OpenCV · VTK · CNN · SHA-256

Medical imaging pipeline reconstructing 3D ovarian volumetric heatmaps from 2D ultrasound slices using voxel stacking, bilateral filtering, and CNN preprocessing. SHA-256 integrity verification for secure diagnostic data.

🏥 Automated follicle detection with ROI extraction and secure image pipeline.
PythonOpenCVVTKCNNLinux
View on GitHub ↗
Cloud / MLOps

Cloud AI Anomaly Detection

AWS EC2 · S3 · Scikit-learn · Docker · CI/CD

End-to-end anomaly detection pipeline on AWS with automated feature engineering, model versioning, drift monitoring, and GitHub Actions CI/CD. Containerized with Docker, PyTest-covered with full MLOps architecture.

⚡ Production-deployed on EC2. Automated retraining via GitHub Actions CI/CD pipeline.
PythonAWSDockerScikit-learnGitHub Actions
